seoTitle: Mount Tenandra vs Mount Tomah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Tenandra and Mount Tomah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Tenandra vs Mount Tomah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Tenandra and Mount Tomah.
heading: Mount Tenandra vs Mount Tomah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Tenandra, New South Wales and Mount Tomah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Tenandra has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Mount Tomah (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Tenandra or Mount Tomah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Tenandra has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Mount Tomah scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Tenandra scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Tomah scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Tenandra or Mount Tomah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Tenandra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
